Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 156 

SUPLR_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Supplier Provider (DME, Pharmacy, Organs, Etc.) Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the supplier provider category; ever in the 
calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: SUPLR_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: SUPLR_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base
